steps.title: Read the correction
steps.content: The first clause says Chaucer did not write in Modern English. The next clause gives the replacement fact: he wrote in Middle English. The transition should signal substitution or correction.

steps.title: Pick the replacement signal
steps.content: A signals cause and effect, C signals addition, and D signals similarity. The relationship is not causal, additive, or parallel; the second clause replaces the negated idea with the actual one. The answer is B.
